scripts.test: npm run build && node -e "const { foreignMinorToMainMinor, convertMinorBetweenUsdMxnEur } = require('./lib/forex.js'); const assert = require('assert'); const r = { USD: 0.05, EUR: 0.048 }; assert.strictEqual(foreignMinorToMainMinor(10000,'USD','MXN',r), 200000); const eur = convertMinorBetweenUsdMxnEur(10000,'USD','EUR',r); assert.strictEqual(eur, 9600); assert.strictEqual(convertMinorBetweenUsdMxnEur(eur,'EUR','USD',r), 10000); console.log('forex ok');" && node -e "const { computeNextTransactionDate, resolveAsOfYmd } = require('./lib/scheduleNext.js'); const assert = require('assert'); assert.strictEqual(computeNextTransactionDate('2026-01-15', { cadence: 'twiceMonthly', daysOfMonth: [1,15], weekday: null }), '2026-02-01'); assert.strictEqual(computeNextTransactionDate('2026-01-31', { cadence: 'monthly', daysOfMonth: [31], weekday: null }), '2026-02-28'); assert.strictEqual(typeof resolveAsOfYmd({ timezone: 'America/Mexico_City' }), 'string'); console.log('schedule ok');"
